original_text:
### Iconography
- Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
- Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
- Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

quotes: default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency of brand icons while securing necessary visual accessibility benchmarks.
rules.rule_text: Icons must use a minimal line illustration style featuring a consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work. Icon colors and backgrounds must only be adjusted within the brand palette. For low-vision accessibility in email, icons must render at a minimum size of 32×32px (dimension.accessibility.icon_render_min = 32px) and default to Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) strokes on light backgrounds.
